HGSS.702.0001:
By the way, I’m a Hiker, so I often go
to mountains and caves.\f
I don’t usually go to the town.\f
I bet you go to all kinds of towns on
your journey, don’t you?\f
You know, if we were to trade phone
numbers, then we could exchange\r
all kinds of information, yes? [0200,0000]
HGSS.702.0002:
I’ll give you a call when I think of a
good, heart-warming story, OK?
HGSS.702.0003:
That’s so sad. I might just end up
secluding myself in the mountain...
HGSS.702.0004:
What do you say?
Would you like to exchange numbers\r
with another adventurer? [0200,0000]
HGSS.702.0005:
You’re nearby, and yet you’re going to
call me on the phone?\f
Am I that “dazzling” that you need to
keep your distance?
HGSS.702.0006:
The other day, I was watching my
[0100,000A,0000] eat some Berries.\r
It looked like it was enjoying its meal,\r
so I decided to try some.\f
I’m not sure if people should eat that
stuff, but it was delicious!\f
All right then!
Be good!
HGSS.702.0007:
Lately, I’ve been running across wild
[0100,000B,0000] quite often.\r
They’re easily taken care of.\f
All right then!
Be good!
HGSS.702.0008:
Oh yeah, I was battling this
[0100,000B,0000] the other day...\r
It took off when I got distracted by a\r
passing Beauty.\f
Learn from my mistake--always stay
focused on the job at hand!\f
All right then!
Be good!
HGSS.702.0009:
Come on--let’s battle right now!\f
[0104,0003,0000] is where I am.
Come on over if you feel up to it!
HGSS.702.0010:
Hello! You haven’t forgotten about our
battle, have you?\f
[0104,0003,0000]! I’m waiting!
HGSS.702.0011:
I wonder why I like mountains so much...\f
It wouldn’t be wrong to say I also like
the Pokémon that dwell on mountains.\f
But I bet that the number one reason is
that I just like mountains.\f
I have no idea what a Swimmer♂’s
thinking...
